description: Mordant is a Kotlin multiplatform library for rendering styled terminal output in command-line applications, including colors, widgets, Markdown, input, animations, and terminal detection. The mordant-jvm-graal-ffi-jvm artifact provides Mordant's JVM-only GraalVM Native Image terminal interface implementation using GraalVM native-image FFI APIs, and is not intended for regular JRE runtimes.
